ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "oxcal_target" TEXT /* OxCal target for the simulation */,
  "a_pass" TEXT /* Pass/fail status for the simulation */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets for the simulation */,
  "span" INTEGER /* Span of the simulation */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples for the simulation */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors for the simulation */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset value for the simulation */,
  "offset_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the offset */,
  "model_run" INTEGER /* Model run number for the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the simulation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., organic, inorganic) */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "lab_report" TEXT /* File path to the lab report for the sample */,
  "research_paper" TEXT /* File path to the research paper for the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the sample */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was analyzed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the target belongs to */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., radiocarbon, stable isotope) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the target */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the target */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy entry */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the accuracy data belongs to */,
  "accuracy_68" REAL /* 68% accuracy value */,
  "accuracy_95" REAL /* 95% accuracy value */,
  "precision_68" REAL /* 68% precision value */,
  "precision_95" REAL /* 95% precision value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the accuracy data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the accuracy data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the accuracy data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the accuracy data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the accuracy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offsets" (
  "offset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offset entry */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the offset data belongs to */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset value */,
  "offset_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the offset */,
  "off_target_68" REAL /* 68% off-target value */,
  "off_target_95" REAL /* 95% off-target value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offset data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the offset data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the offset data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the offset data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the offset data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offsets_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation/sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the simulation/sample */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the simulation/sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the paper is associated with */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the paper is associated with */,
  "paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "paper_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the paper */,
  "paper_date" TEXT /* Date of paper publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., submitted, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
